title: senecio africanus
intro: Senecio africanus, also known as the African bush elder or Bush Geranium, is a shrub native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving digestion, due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. Traditionally, Senecio africanus is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and menstrual disorders.
